standard: B-Tech BT77 / BT-series tilt+swivel speaker wall mount
description: Tilt-adjustable loudspeaker wall mount: a wall plate with a bolt pattern, a standoff arm, a tilt-pivot knuckle, and a speaker-side plate held at a set tilt with fixing holes; optional arm gusset. One connected bracket.
source: B-Tech BT77 spec sheet (wall-plate holes, arm reach, tilt); BT1/BT15/BT332 line (reach/tilt ranges); plate/arm proportions
